case_title: YIN FEI CHEN ET AL VS. IDALIA CECIBEL LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, YIN FEI (AND GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR, COLIN L.) LIU, COLIN AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA CECIBEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED MAY-02-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA CECIBEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-14-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS YIN FEI CHEN AND COLIN LIU APPEARED THROUGH CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT IDALIA CECIBEL LOPEZ APPEARED. SERVICE OF CLAIM REQUIRED OR IF VALID, PROCESS SERVER PETER YEE MUST APPEAR. PLAINTIFF TO FILE PETITION FOR GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-14-2017 AT 1:30PM.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF - STATUS UPDATE ON REQUIRED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YIN FEI (AND GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR, COLIN L.)
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR COLIN LIU (PER JULY-10-2017 ORDER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YIN FEI (AND GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR, COLIN L.)
ORDER (EX PARTE) GRANTING PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM;[X] THE COURT ORDERS THAT YIN FEI CHEN IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR: COLIN LIU.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED JUL-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA CECIBEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 - CONTINUE ORDER FOR 08/14/2017 SERVED JUL-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA CECIBEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF AND GUARDIAN AD LITEM YIN FEI CHEN WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. PLAINTIFF COLIN LIU WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IDALIA LOPEZ WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, YIN FEI (AND GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR, COLIN L.) LIU, COLIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA CECIBEL THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
